wine_hotels.name: Hostal Sport
wine_hotels.address: Carrer Miquel Barcelo 6, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
wine_hotels.wine_program: Cellar assembled since 1928 with back-vintages of DOQ Priorat and DO Montsant; sommelier-curated cellar dining and winemaker events throughout the year
wine_hotels.description: Falset's iconic wine-route hotel since 1928; a 95-year cellar, Catalan kitchen and a winemaker social calendar make it the essential Priorat base.

wine_hotels.name: La Rectoria de la Vilella Baixa
wine_hotels.address: Carrer de l'Esglesia 2, 43373 La Vilella Baixa, Tarragona, Spain
wine_hotels.category: Boutique hotel in a converted 18th-century rectory
wine_hotels.wine_program: Priorat welcome tasting on arrival; converted chapel dining room for private wine-paired dinners; owner-guided vineyard walks
wine_hotels.description: Converted 18th-century rectory in La Vilella Baixa, heart of the DOQ Priorat slate terraces; intimate welcome tasting and private-chapel wine dinners.

verified.address_quoted: Carrer de l'Esglesia 2, La Vilella Baixa

wine_hotels.name: Mas Petit
wine_hotels.address: Camino del Mas Petit s/n, 43739 Porrera, Tarragona, Spain
wine_hotels.category: Boutique rural hotel in a renovated stone mas
wine_hotels.wine_program: Estate Priorat tasting at breakfast; guided vineyard walks and winery visit arrangements with Porrera-zone producers
wine_hotels.description: Converted stone farmhouse above Porrera with vineyard views and a breakfast Priorat tasting; the closest boutique hotel to the Val Llach and Mas Doix estates.

verified.address_quoted: Camino del Mas Petit s/n, Porrera

wine_hotels.name: Hotel Casa Aliva
wine_hotels.category: Boutique hotel in a restored village house
wine_hotels.wine_program: Priorat and Montsant welcome tasting; owner-curated wine list available in-room; partnerships with local estates for private tastings
wine_hotels.description: Falset boutique hotel in a restored stone village house; individual rooms with wine-cellar decorative elements and a welcome Priorat tasting.

wine_hotels.name: Cal Lleal Rural House
wine_hotels.address: Carrer del Forn 8, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
wine_hotels.category: Traditional Catalan rural house (casa de pageses) with self-catering
wine_hotels.wine_program: Owners arrange Priorat and Montsant tasting sessions; wine-pairing dinners on request
wine_hotels.description: Traditional rural house in Falset offering self-catering rooms; owners arrange tasting sessions with local producers and wine-pairing dinners on request.

wine_hotels.name: Finca Trossos del Priorat
wine_hotels.address: Camino dels Trossos s/n, 43737 Gratallops, Tarragona, Spain
wine_hotels.wine_program: Private Priorat tasting on arrival; vineyard walks from the property to neighbouring Gratallops estates; harvest participation in September
wine_hotels.description: Rural vineyard guesthouse within walking distance of Gratallops; private tasting on arrival and harvest participation available in September.

wine_hotels.name: Hotel Rural el Priorat
wine_hotels.address: Carrer de la Mina 6, 43738 Bellmunt del Priorat, Tarragona, Spain
wine_hotels.category: Rural hotel in the slate-mining village of Bellmunt
wine_hotels.wine_program: Base for llicorella terrace hikes; owner arranges Bellmunt-zone producer visits and stocks local Priorat wine for guests
wine_hotels.description: Rural hotel in Bellmunt del Priorat, the old lead-mining village on the DOQ terrace; ideal base for the Bellmunt-Porrera llicorella hike.

verified.address_quoted: Carrer de la Mina 6, Bellmunt del Priorat

wine_hotels.name: Masia els Comellars
wine_hotels.address: Cami dels Comellars s/n, 43737 Gratallops, Tarragona, Spain
wine_hotels.category: Restored stone masia with vineyard views
wine_hotels.wine_program: Gratallops estate tasting on check-in; harvest week stays available; owners connect guests with local producers for private visits
wine_hotels.description: Restored farmhouse in the Gratallops countryside with vineyard panoramas; a quiet retreat with estate Priorat tasting included and harvest-week packages.

wine_hotels.name: Hostal les Vinyes
wine_hotels.address: Carretera T-702 km 4, 43739 El Lloar, Tarragona, Spain
wine_hotels.category: Small roadside hostal among the DOQ Priorat vineyards
wine_hotels.wine_program: Simple hostal with a locally sourced wine list; location on the T-702 wine route makes it ideal for cyclists and hikers exploring the El Lloar zone
wine_hotels.description: Modest hostal on the T-702 wine-route road near El Lloar; budget-friendly DOQ Priorat base for cyclists and hikers on the Bellmunt-El Lloar trail.

wine_hotels.name: Mas d'en Gil Rural Stay
wine_hotels.address: Cami del Mas d'en Gil s/n, 43782 Batea, Tarragona, Spain
wine_hotels.category: Estate stay at the DO Terra Alta boundary with Priorat access
wine_hotels.wine_program: Garnacha Blanca and Garnacha Negra tasting programme; proximity to DOQ Priorat allows day-touring
wine_hotels.description: Estate stay at Mas d'en Gil on the Terra Alta and Priorat boundary; white Garnacha specialist with winemaking-focused visits and a self-contained rural house.

verified.address_quoted: Cami del Mas d'en Gil s/n, Batea

wine_hotels.name: Celler Val Llach Guest Caseta
wine_hotels.address: Carrer de la Font 38, 43739 Porrera, Tarragona, Spain
wine_hotels.category: Estate guesthouse attached to Celler Val Llach in Porrera
wine_hotels.wine_program: Private Priorat vertical with the winemaker on check-in; optional dinner at the estate restaurant; morning vineyard walk
wine_hotels.description: Two-room caseta attached to Celler Val Llach in Porrera; the most intimate estate stay in DOQ Priorat, with a private Val Llach vertical on arrival.

wine_hotels.name: La Sequera Vineyard Hotel
wine_hotels.address: Carrer Major 3, 43374 La Vilella Alta, Tarragona, Spain
wine_hotels.category: Small vineyard hotel in La Vilella Alta village
wine_hotels.wine_program: Village-estate Priorat tasting included; hosts La Vilella Alta producer dinners and walking tours of the surrounding DOQ terraces
wine_hotels.description: Small hotel in La Vilella Alta, one of the most scenic DOQ Priorat villages; surrounded by old-vine Garnacha terraces with producer dinner events.
